raw_text: Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. We ordered mehndi cones worth ₹60 (4 cones), but the quality was extremely poor. The mehndi gave almost no colour at all and felt completely useless. When we contacted customer support for a replacement or return, they refused to help. It feels like a waste of money and very bad customer service. Not recommended.

blinkit team delivered dirty and used items to customers. yesterday I had ordered some items like Sampoo, Biskut and good morning grooming kit which somebody used perfume and cream then packed again to sell the same to customer. this is so horrible and not acceptable. I never used again blinkit for ordering something.

Very nice app for authentic and genuine products. However, some checks and verification systems should be in place to flush out a few substandard items that are also included along with the whole range of other available adorable products.

Do not buy any electronic goods online from Blinkit. They take absolutely no responsibility if your product turns out to be defective after delivery. They will simply deny your request and tell you to contact the brand of the product you purchased. On June 7th, I bought a Zebronics Bluetooth speaker from them, but it has not been charging since day one. Even after charging it for 12 hours, it provides no backup. When I tried to return it, they refused to accept the return .Never buy electronics

worst app you can ever find if the delivery Partner is rude and does not deliver your order also the support team is very very bad they don't follow up your money gets deducted and you won't receive your order since 2 hours I have been contacting them they still didn't resolve it

so far I had nothing to complain but now I have returned my order right after receiving it since it was a bit colour faded I had to return the pick up was done but my refund is not we pay upfront and trust on the refund which takes more than 10 days fine, but I haven't received it there is no option to call you people or expect an agent to text this is worst

The items often come in damaged or unsealed condition. Sometimes the items are dirty and the packaging is poor. Rainy season has to be taken into consideration while delivering items that can get damaged.
Had a great experience till now. Items are delivered at exact location and on time.....Very helpful..... sometimes the cod is not available which is really frustrating

App is good but they promise of 9 min but order does not com in 9 mins and sometimes payment failure debt from customer account but order failed and not get refund 😡. but overall I will give 2 and half . but there was not option for 2 and half so I gave 3 ...

Horrible service! Sent expired bread. I ordered a packet of bread from Blinkit today, and to my shock, it was already expired at the time of delivery. This is completely unacceptable and a major health hazard. Please check your inventory before delivering food items to customers. Extremely disappointed with this lack of quality control! blinkit even if it is the last option do not order !!!!

everything is perfect related to delivery and items, but delivery men say for online payment sometimes online is not available so they say we don't have change so we have to give round of amount, so sometimes we pay extra for it..

Very disappointed with Blinkit. I ordered multiple products, but some items were missing from the delivery, including products that I had already paid for. I raised a complaint immediately, but the issue has not been resolved properly. The customer support response has been unsatisfactory, and I am still waiting for a fair resolution. This experience has caused inconvenience and frustration. I expected better service and accountability from Blinkit.i have elaborated on your support gmail

I was charged a surge fee due to 'high demand,' which I accepted assuming it meant my order was being prioritized. Instead, the order was still delayed. It feels unfair to charge a premium for 'crowded' periods if the infrastructure can't actually handle the volume

every time I am trying to purchase anything from blinkit I get the error due to excess demand currently unavailable.. and I am not able to purchase anything today was the first time I am not able to purchase anything for 8 hours I think is better to go to swiggy then blinkit at least I don't have to wait for 8 hours to order something from them

it gives fast service and all products are as it is u dont have to worry about your refund they reunds in 2-3 days and there's no complaint so I'll give 5/5 stars... just one thing is they charge 30₹ for delivery which is unnecessary you should charge but some 10-15 rupees else everything is good 👍🏻👍🏻

Hello Team, I ordered Gulab Brand Karachi Halwa from Blinkit, but the product delivered was fake. After I complained, a replacement was sent, yet it was also fake. Even the brand confirmed the products were not genuine, and the taste was completely different from the original. To make matters worse, after multiple complaints, Blinkit's customer support blocked my number instead of resolving the issue. Extremely disappointing experience and a complete loss of trust.

The estimated delivery time was not accurate and kept increasing during the order. The delivery arrived significantly later than expected. When contacted, the delivery partner mentioned a vehicle puncture. Unfortunately, due to the delay, the ice cream had melted by the time it arrived. I would appreciate more accurate delivery estimates and better service reliability.

REFUND SCAMMERS I had got to return a torn damaged product and they sent a "Special Coupon" or "Promo Code" imagine my own refund money is a Promo Code to them. And now while ordering item to apply it there was no option. Instead picked my UPI payment method automatically. Also Previously they sent wrong item & support promised to send correct product but resent same wrong item. when I tried to chat for refund they closed chat saying replaced item cannot be refunded or replaced.

This is extremely disappointing. I received a GOBOULT Astra TWS Earbuds order in a tampered package. The charging cable and warranty card were missing, and the charging case indicator light was not working. I immediately contacted your support team and shared all the required photos. After verification, your executive Sara approved a return pickup and a full refund of Rs 1240. but got cancelled and after that the other agent told me to directly contact to the seller.

the experience was very good, if you are in a hurry and you get the things in 20 to 30 mins its good than waiting for two in other apps and it also has imported things and all types of things with great offers, i also get vouchers in my every order, it is the best app try even using it once
